sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 20.39 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.20)

statement.latex: Let$F$be a non-abelian finitely generated free group,$1 w F$, and$n 1$. Is the group$F,t t^n=w$linear of degree 2 over a field of characteristic 0 if$w$is not a proper power in~$F$? This question is motivated by the following well-known question: is it true that the free$$-group$F^$is linear over a field? (See 13.39(b).) { A.\,Jaikin-Zapirain}

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory VI_BRIDGING; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
